subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God! I am Thy servant and the son of Thy servant. I have turned towards Thine all-highest horizon and set my face towards the lights of Thy countenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل الهی انا عبدک و ابن عبدک قد اقبلت الی افقک الاعلی و توجهت الی انوار وجهک
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for nearness to God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for spiritual recognition
